name: Professional Base Knowledge Pack
description: Baseline professional knowledge shipped with LocalAIFactory: practical, original summaries and patterns across software engineering, CRUD-over-MSSQL, databases, Python/AI/RAG, security, governance, control-style standards, finance/accounting/banking, operations, product/admin patterns, and reporting. Designed to strengthen every repository analysis, support, documentation, and autonomous-engineering workflow.
license: Original professional summaries and practical patterns authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No third-party source is vendored.
legalLimitations: This pack contains ORIGINAL practical summaries only. It does NOT reproduce ISO/IEC, PMBOK, or any other proprietary or paid standard text verbatim, and it does not assert official certification or compliance. Governance and control-style items are practical summaries, not substitutes for the licensed standards or for formal legal, regulatory, or compliance advice. Finance/accounting/banking items describe general domain concepts and are not jurisdiction-specific advice.
sourcePolicy: Original professional summaries and practical patterns only. No proprietary ISO, PMBOK, or paid standard text copied verbatim. Every item carries an explicit limitation note and a confidence score.
